query:
SELECT dp.id, dp.date, dp.dayType, dp.status, COUNT(sb.id) AS blocks
FROM dailyPlans dp
LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks sb ON sb.planId = dp.id
WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-26','2026-05-28')
GROUP BY dp.id
ORDER BY dp.date;
